Genetics and Bioengineering

Our Mission

MENU

Istanbul Okan University Department of Genetics and Bioengineering includes research and application areas such as genetics, tissue engineering, stem cell biology, cancer biology, developmental biology, cell biology, stem cell biology, immunology, synthetic biology and epigenetics.

Our aim is to combine engineering and life sciences to produce new information with high social and economic value in order to increase the quality and duration of life by conducting basic, applied and translational research, and thus to enable the development of biomedical technologies, advanced diagnosis and treatments. In addition to advanced technology research in education, our goal is to train bioengineers who are well-equipped, with a desire for lifelong learning, who can produce new perspectives and technologies, take a leadership role in the medical, pharmaceutical, and biotechnological industry and academia.

Mission

The mission of the Department of Genetics and Bioengineering is to provide students with fundamental and applied knowledge in the field; to educate scientists and professionals with high research competence, committed to ethical values, and capable of producing innovative solutions in interdisciplinary areas such as biotechnology, health, and the environment, thereby contributing to the benefit of society.

Vision

The vision of the Department of Genetics and Bioengineering is to become a pioneering, innovative, and distinguished department at both national and international levels, guiding scientific research, biotechnological innovations, and sustainable solutions, while contributing to human health and quality of life.
